sentence: 首批志愿者已经抵达灾区。
pinyin: Shǒu pī zhìyuànzhě yǐjīng dǐdá zāiqū.
english: The first batch of volunteers has already arrived in the disaster area.

sentence: 太阳是距离地球最近的恒星。
pinyin: Tàiyáng shì jùlí dìqiú zuì jìn de héngxīng.
english: The sun is the nearest star to Earth.

sentence: 政府向灾区拨款用于重建工作。
pinyin: Zhèngfǔ xiàng zāiqū bōkuǎn yòng yú chóngjiàn gōngzuò.
english: The government allocated funds to the disaster area for reconstruction.

sentence: 我去税务局办了一张发票。
pinyin: Wǒ qù shuìwù jú bàn le yī zhāng fāpiào.
english: I went to the tax office to get an invoice.

sentence: 这家工厂正在改制，变成股份公司。
pinyin: Zhè jiā gōngchǎng zhèngzài gǎizhì, biànchéng gǔfèn gōngsī.
english: This factory is being restructured into a joint-stock company.
